title: Statistical Inference, Bayesian Updating, and Prediction
description: Build, test, and communicate a model involving evidence-based prediction. Learners cumulatively produce a reproducible advanced statistics computational study through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Formulate likelihood estimation in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive interval test theory in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute bayesian models in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
